articles.title: Gold surpasses U.S. Treasuries, euro in global official reserves: ECB
articles.description: FRANKFURT, June 2 (Xinhua) -- Gold became the largest component of global official reserves in 2025, surpassing holdings of U.S. Treasuries and the euro as rising prices boosted its share, the European Central Bank (ECB) said Tuesday.
